displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years: Droids & Ewoks
synopsis: A complete collection of all-ages adventures starring the droids and Ewoks of *Star Wars*. Join Wicket and his Ewok friends Teebo and Princess Kneesaa in their forest home of Endor for colorful capers filled with rainbow bridges and rites of power. And in stories set years before they find a home with the Rebels, follow C-3PO and R2-D2 on their search for a master, a quest that stretches across space and beyond as a chronal crossover sees the droids meet the Ewoks for the very first time. The volume also offers a fresh perspective on the events of the original film in a tale called "Star Wars According to the Droids."
title: Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years: Droids & Ewoks
